notFound.title: Page No Dey
notFound.description: Di page wey you dey find no dey exist or dem don move am.

home.heroBadge: We dey proudly serve communities for di whole country since 1952
home.heroDescription: Join 175,000+ members wey dey enjoy beta rates, low fees, and personal service. As credit union wey no dey find profit, your money wahala na our only mission.
home.productsDescription: From everyday banking to big life moments, we get di right solution for you.
home.whyChooseUsDescription: As credit union wey members own, we dey invest for di tools and services wey matter most to you.
home.ctaTitle: You Ready to Join di Credit Union Family?
home.ctaDescription: Open your account for few minutes — online or for any of our branches. Membership dey open for anybody wey dey our community.
